title: selliguea pui
intro: Selliguea pui, also known as the Pui plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selliguea pui include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory infections and skin disorders.
